events.title: Build Club Launch Workshop
events.description: one day hands-on workshop across robotics, IoT, power electronics and software. Simple projects to kickstart the build momentum.

projects.title: Smart Flow
projects.description: IoT-based water flow monitoring system using ESP32 and ThingSpeak cloud. Real-time visualization on mobile.

projects.title: Line-Bot
projects.description: Autonomous line-following robot with PID control. Built for inter-college competition circuits.

projects.title: Inverse Teleprompter
projects.description: Wireless speech-to-text teleprompter using ESPNOW protocol for low-latency communication between devices.

projects.title: Step It Up
projects.description: Boost converter design and implementation on breadboard. Step-up circuit with variable duty cycle control.

projects.title: Filmfare Robot
projects.description: Tabletop robot arm that tracks a face using inverse kinematics. Camera always points at the actor.

projects.title: Build Club Web Portal
projects.description: Full-stack web portal for the Build Club with admin dashboard, event management, and member tracking.

team.name: President
team.bio: Leads the club, sets vision and drives the club forward.

team.name: Vice President
team.bio: Supports President, manages workshop curriculum and troubleshoots complex project bottlenecks.

team.name: Treasurer
team.bio: Manages club finances, budget allocation and resource procurement.

team.name: General Secretary
team.bio: Handles documentation, correspondence and day-to-day club operations.

team.name: Assistant Secretary
team.bio: Assists General Secretary, coordinates events and member communications.

team.name: Social Media Manager
team.bio: Manages social media presence, creates content and drives community engagement.

siteContent.heroDescription: A student-driven maker community where learning feels like play. 24x7 open lab, cross-disciplinary teams, real hardware, real projects.
siteContent.aboutText: Build Club is a vibrant, student-driven community where learning feels like play. Like a child with Lego, we believe the best engineers are built through hands-on creation, not textbooks. We're open 24x7. Come walk in, form a team, and build something that matters.
siteContent.contactText: Walk into Build Club, introduce yourself, and start making things. No experience required, only curiosity. Reach out to learn more or join our next workshop.

roadmap.title: Pre-Launch
roadmap.desc: Core team assembled, infrastructure ready, membership drive, workshop prep.

roadmap.title: Build Club Launch
roadmap.desc: one-day hands-on kickoff workshop across all domains. Simple projects to ignite momentum.

roadmap.title: Takes Off
roadmap.desc: Core team takes ownership. Open hours set. Calendar of events. Projects released to community.

roadmap.title: Domain Specific Programs
roadmap.desc: Robotics, IC Design, VR Learning, finishing schools and competitions at national level.
